form.failure: Failed to send. Please try again shortly.

step1.title: Sawnext, your private concierge.
step1.lede: A by-invitation selection, without noise. Activate your code to enter your space.

step2.title: How would you like to be addressed?
step2.lede: Salvatore and the team will address every exchange to your name. No data transmitted to any third party.

step3.title: Salvatore Montemagno will guide you.
step3.lede: A single point of contact, reachable any time from your space. Reply within 30 working minutes, standard NDA activated.

auth.lede: You already have access. Pick the mode that suits you: your email + password pair, a single-use access link sent by email, or the invitation code Salvatore gave you.
auth.modeEmailHint: For already-registered members. Direct sign-in to your space.
auth.modeMagicLinkHint: Receive a single-use access link. No password to remember.
auth.modeInvitationHint: Activate your invitation code for the first sign-in.
auth.magicLinkSent: Access link sent. Please check your inbox in the coming minutes.

account.dashboardLede: A curated selection prepared for you, your active inquiries, and direct access to your concierge.

intent.heading: What can I find for you today?

travel.title: I'd like to travel
travel.drawerLede: Describe the destination, dates, number of travellers and any constraints — Salvatore composes the itinerary.
travel.placeholder: E.g. Maldives in November, 4 people, 10 days, jet included, hotel on private atoll.

object.title: I'm looking for a specific object
object.hint: Horology, artwork, collector car — describe the piece.
object.drawerTitle: I'm looking for a specific object
object.drawerLede: Be specific — reference, acceptable years, expected condition, papers, possible price range. Salvatore activates the network.
object.placeholder: E.g. Patek Philippe Nautilus 5711/1A blue dial, 2018-2022, full set, good condition minimum.

event.title: I want to organise an event
event.hint: Wedding, jubilee, private dinner, seminar — from brief to last toast.
event.drawerTitle: I want to organise an event
event.drawerLede: Tell us the nature, approximate date, guest count, venue if already chosen.
event.placeholder: E.g. Wedding 220 guests at Lake Como, summer 2027, Villa del Balbianello preferred.

jet.title: I need a private jet
jet.hint: Short or long-haul, 6h notice is enough.

preferences.contactConcierge: To update any of these details, contact your concierge.
preferences.notifEmailHint: Receive acknowledgements and updates by email.
preferences.notifPhoneHint: Your concierge can reach you directly by phone.
preferences.recommendationsHint: Selection tailored to your interests on the dashboard.

events.title: Private events
events.lede: Galas, openings, private dinners, sport — access kept off-market.

properties.title: Properties
properties.lede: Selected residences across Switzerland and Europe, on request.

timepieces.title: Timepieces
timepieces.lede: Collector horology, full set with documented provenance.

artworks.title: Artworks
artworks.lede: Unique pieces by contemporary artists, certificates of authenticity included.

journeys.title: Journeys
journeys.lede: Bespoke itineraries — private jet, yacht, guided expeditions.

concierge.title: Concierge
concierge.lede: Bespoke service capabilities — transport, gastronomy, security, medical, cultural.

catalogue.title: The catalogue
catalogue.lede: Every opportunity curated by your concierge, at a glance.

wizard.openHint: Tell us what you're looking for — we'll handle the rest.
wizard.title: What can I find for you?

category.lede: Choose the area of your request.

details.lede: Describe your need — brand, model, dates, constraints, approximate budget. The more precise, the faster we move.
details.photoHint: Helpful for a watch, an artwork, a specific object.
details.allOptional: All fields are optional. Leave blank what you don't know yet — Salvatore will get back to clarify.

extras.lede: Add photos and any details that help us understand better.

other.lede: No catalogue covers everything. Tell us what you need — even one-off — our concierge knows unusual cases and will find a way.
other.placeholder: Whatever you need — private access, rare object search, specific arrangement, medical urgency — just tell us.

callback.hint: No form — he gets back to you within 24h.

review.title: Everything is ready
review.lede: Your concierge will get back to you within 24 hours.

admin.dashboardLede: Active inquiries, invitation codes, recent signups.

invitations.title: Invitations
invitations.mockBanner: Demo mode — Supabase not configured. Actions are local only.

catalogue.title: Catalogue
catalogue.lede: Add, edit or remove items, events, journeys, services and articles. Every change appears in the member space instantly.

admin.confirmDelete: Confirm deletion — this is permanent (lot B: localStorage reset restores).
admin.empty: No item for this module. Click + Add to create the first one.

toasts.created: Item created. Visible in the member space now.

inquiry.drawerLede: Your concierge gets back to you within 24 hours.
inquiry.messagePlaceholder: Mention any constraints, dates or questions.
inquiry.success: Request transmitted. Salvatore will reach out within 24 hours.

jet.drawerLede: Tell us departure, arrival and passengers — Salvatore confirms availability within 30 minutes.
jet.notesPlaceholder: Pets, special equipment, meals, diplomatic constraints…
jet.success: Flight request transmitted. Salvatore confirms within 30 minutes.
jet.salvaReassurance: Salvatore (your concierge) receives this request directly and confirms within 30 working minutes. At any time, you can call from the button bottom-right.

dock.title: Your concierge
dock.availability: Available 7 days a week, 6 a.m. – 11 p.m. Europe/Zurich
dock.writeLede: Write freely — Salvatore reads each message personally and replies within 24 hours.

samples.property: This property came off a private collection last week. The family lived there twenty years — the history is intact. Three clients are in parallel conversation alongside this listing — call me before visiting, I'll tell you where we stand.
samples.timepiece: The set is complete, seals intact. I verified the papers this morning with the authorised dealer. The piece will not go to auction — it's a private cession, owner to owner. If you're interested, I'll put you in direct contact.
samples.artwork: I knew this piece at Galerie Standard in Oslo in 2024. The gallery entrusted us with it exclusively before it returns to collection. The smoked-oak frame is included. I can organise a studio visit with the artist if you really want to feel the material.
samples.journey: This is an itinerary we composed for two families this summer. The French-speaking ranger we privatise across 8 days makes all the difference — no sharing with another group. On these dates, we know the Mombo suite is available. I can block it for 48 hours.

schedule.title: Book 30 minutes with Salvatore
schedule.lede: Pick a slot in the next 7 days. You receive the confirmation and iCal invitation within 30 minutes.
schedule.timezone: Europe/Zurich hours. If nothing fits, write to Salvatore — he adapts.
schedule.notesHint: Helps Salvatore prepare the conversation. A few words is enough.
schedule.notesPlaceholder: E.g. review wishlist + question about the July stay.
schedule.calendarHint: Once confirmed, the iCal invitation arrives by email. One-click add to Google Calendar / Outlook.
schedule.success: Request sent. Salvatore confirms {{day}} at {{slot}} within 30 minutes.

saved.title: My collection
saved.lede: The pieces you've pinned. Salvatore sees your collection and can anticipate.
saved.emptyLede: Tap heart on any piece you're drawn to — it'll appear here. Salvatore reads the list and proposes accordingly.

search.label: Search your space
search.placeholder: Search a watch, a property, an event…
search.empty: No result. Rephrase or describe your need to Salvatore.

bespoke.title: Describe what you're after — we'll handle it
bespoke.lede: Salvatore and his network open the right doors. The more specific you are (reference, range, dates), the faster the answer arrives.
bespoke.descriptionHint: Be as specific as possible — reference, brand, era, dimensions, constraints.
bespoke.descriptionPlaceholder: E.g. Patek Philippe Aquanaut 5167A steel black dial, 2018-2022, full set, papers required, range 60-75K CHF.
bespoke.budgetHint: Optional but recommended — speeds up network triage.
bespoke.attachHint: Reference visuals, screenshots, existing certificates, plans. Up to 5 files.
bespoke.confidentialHint: Your request is handled by Salvatore only. Standard NDA activated, no indexing, no resale.
bespoke.success: Bespoke request sent. Salvatore will reach out within 24 hours.

generic.title: Not finding what you're looking for?
generic.lede: Describe it. Salvatore activates his network — rare watches, off-market properties, event access, custom-composed journeys.

property.title: Your ideal property isn't here?
property.lede: A specific neighbourhood, a particular layout, a precise view? Our off-market network covers all of Europe.

timepiece.title: The reference you want isn't listed?
timepiece.lede: Tell us the brand, reference, year, expected condition. Salvatore activates partner dealers and collectors.

artwork.title: The piece isn't in the catalogue?
artwork.lede: Artist, era, medium, range — we activate the galleries and auction houses we work with.

event.title: Interested in a specific event?
event.lede: Closed gala, opening night, private concert — describe it, we check seats and negotiate access.

journey.title: Your dream trip isn't listed?
journey.lede: Destination, duration, level of accompaniment, constraints — Salvatore composes the itinerary end to end.

concierge.title: Need a service that isn't here?
concierge.lede: Describe it — security, medical, event logistics. We activate the appropriate partner team.

trust.modalLede: Sawnext Studio is a Swiss private concierge. Every request, every transaction, every exchange follows the protocol below — no exception.
trust.footerNote: For specific legal questions, your lawyer or notary is invited to contact our compliance department directly — Salvatore will introduce them.

nda.title: Standard NDA on every request
nda.body: Every request from your space automatically triggers a confidentiality agreement signed by both parties. No third party has access.

encryption.title: End-to-end encrypted communications
encryption.body: Outgoing emails encrypted via Resend, data stored at Supabase Frankfurt with at-rest encryption. Passwords Argon2id-hashed.

residency.title: Data residency — European Union
residency.body: Personal data hosted in Germany (Supabase EU-Central-1, Frankfurt). No extra-EU transfer without standard contractual clauses.

vetted.title: Vetted circle — by-invitation access only
vetted.body: Catalogue access requires a single-use invitation code handed in person. No public sign-up flow, no unverified referrals.

escrow.title: Escrow available for sensitive transactions
escrow.body: For major acquisitions (horology, real estate, art), our partner notary in Geneva can escrow funds until effective transfer.

compliance.title: GDPR + Swiss DPA compliant
compliance.body: Your access, rectification, erasure and portability rights are operational within 7 days. Data Protection Officer reachable directly.

audit.title: Audit log available on request
audit.body: Every view, request and profile modification is logged. You can export your full audit log at any time via Salvatore.

public.intro: A by-invitation selection for a vetted clientele. Without noise, without excess.

cp6.before: What you will not find in

hero.metaFieldText: Private services, confidential projects, off-market access. A single point of contact. No agency, no platform.

presentation.lead: Independent by structure. Discreet by discipline. Selective by necessity.
presentation.p1: SAW↗NEXT supports private clients and entrepreneurs on projects, opportunities and experiences that fall outside the standard frame.
presentation.p2: The network spans sport, watchmaking, finance, real estate and art. It was built through cooptation, not outreach.
presentation.paragraph1: SAW↗NEXT supports private clients and entrepreneurs on projects, opportunities and experiences that fall outside the standard frame. The network spans sport, watchmaking, finance, real estate and art. It was built through cooptation, not outreach.
presentation.paragraph2: Our role rests on three verbs: identify, structure, facilitate. We do not replace any expert. We open doors that others do not see. What comes through us never leaves through any other channel. No client case. No name. No anecdote.
presentation.paragraph3: No sales pitch. No demo. A conversation, a qualification, then — if the project sits within our scope — a written engagement. The pace is that of the case, not of a platform. Every collaboration starts with a frame: scope, deliverables, checkpoints, duration. No grey areas.

identify.title: Identify.
identify.desc: Read the brief, isolate the real need, distinguish the request from the symptom. Five questions, never more.

structure.title: Structure.
structure.desc: Frame the scope, select the useful partners, write the plan. Everything is recorded, everything is dated.

facilitate.title: Facilitate.
facilitate.desc: Lift obstacles silently, all the way to delivery. Discretion is a deliverable like any other.

p1.body: is not an argument. It is built over time, through actions, and verified when things get difficult. We do not ask for it. We work to deserve it.

p2.body: is not optional. No name, no anecdote, no client case will leave this house. Our references speak through cooptation, or not at all.

p3.prefix: And beyond projects, what matters most are
p3.body: . A single interlocutor. No platform, no chain where everyone passes responsibility.

principles.footer: What we do not compromise on.

06.name: VIP events

07.title: Lifestyle management.

access.heroLede: A few current exclusivities, exactly as they appear inside your private space. What you see here is only a fragment — details, availability and the rest unlock after cooptation.

modal.title: Introduce yourself.
modal.lede: A few details so we're aligned before the conversation. Salvatore calls you back within 24 hours.

fields.messagePlaceholder: Who introduced us, what you're looking for, and when you'd like to talk.

modal.legal: Your information stays strictly between you and Salvatore. No shared database, no newsletter, no commercial relay.
modal.requestSuccess: Request sent. Salvatore calls you back within 24 hours.
modal.noCodeYet: I don't have a code — fill the form

code.label: Invitation code
code.helper: Format SAW-XXXX-XXXX, issued directly by Salvatore.
code.legal: The code is personal and single-use. It requires no prior information.

interlocutor.bio: Every exchange begins with a conversation. One interlocutor, from first contact to delivery.
interlocutor.salvaBio: 20 years of experience in the luxury industry. Distribution, advisory and relationship management for HNWI and UHNW clientele. Expertise in luxury, premium partnerships and client relations. Your direct interlocutor, from first word to delivery.

harry.bio: Former top-level professional athlete. International network across sport, events and high-end lifestyle. Involved in several entrepreneurial ventures focused on connection and advisory.

bokar.bio: Football agent representing leading European players, based in Paris. Familiar with the expectations of demanding international clientele and access to closed circles.
